channel.title: Command-Line on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Command-Line on Arrans github.io

item.title: noborus/ov
item.description: 🎑Feature-rich terminal-based text viewer. It is a so-called terminal pager.

item.title: charmbracelet/vhs
item.description: Your CLI home video recorder 📼

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: microsoft/terminal
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
item.description: Like neofetch, but much faster because written mostly in C.

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: dylanaraps/neofetch
item.description: 🖼️ A command-line system information tool written in bash 3.2+

item.title: PowerShell/PowerShell
item.description: PowerShell for every system!

item.title: dolthub/dolt
item.description: Dolt – Git for Data

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: TheZoraiz/ascii-image-converter
item.description: A cross-platform command-line tool to convert images into ascii art and print them on the console. Now supports braille art!

item.title: johnkerl/miller
item.description: Miller is like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON

item.title: commitizen/cz-cli
item.description: The commitizen command line utility. #BlackLivesMatter

item.title: zyedidia/micro
item.description: A modern and intuitive terminal-based text editor

item.title: 89luca89/distrobox
item.description: Use any linux distribution inside your terminal. Enable both backward and forward compatibility with software and freedom to use whatever distribution you’re more comfortable with. Mirror available at: https://gitlab.com/89luca89/distrobox

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.title: bcicen/ctop
item.description: Top-like interface for container metrics

item.title: manifoldco/promptui
item.description: Interactive prompt for command-line applications

item.title: mergestat/mergestat-lite
item.description: Query git repositories with SQL. Generate reports, perform status checks, analyze codebases. 🔍 📊

item.title: guptarohit/asciigraph
item.description: Go package to make lightweight ASCII line graph ╭┈╯ in command line apps with no other dependencies.

item.title: jzelinskie/faq
item.description: Format Agnostic jQ – process various formats with libjq

item.title: mrusme/neonmodem
item.description: Neon Modem Overdrive

item.title: dongyx/hardv
item.description: A Powerful Flashcard Program for Linux, macOS, and Other Unix-like Systems
